title: Marketplace Manager - Treebo Hotels - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Treebo Hotels - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Treebo Hotels family as a Marketplace Manager in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Treebo Hotels:
Treebo Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels!
